title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.210 - Services commission may provide for nonprofit corporations
text:
215.210.  Services commission may provide for nonprofit corporations. — The commission is authorized to provide to nonprofit corporations such advisory, consultative, training and education services as will assist them to become owners of housing constructed or rehabilitated under sections 215.010 to 215.250. Advisory and education services may include, but are not necessarily limited to, technical and professional planning assistance, the preparation and promulgation of organizational planning and development outlines and guides, consultation services, training courses, seminars and lectures, the preparation and dissemination of newsletters and other printed materials and the services of field representatives.  The commission is also authorized to provide nonprofit corporations with advisory, consultative, technical, training and educational services in the management of residential housing, including but not limited to home management and training and advisory services for the residents so as to promote efficient and harmonious management thereof.
(L. 1969 H.B. 130 § 31)
